discovery_confirm.title: GL-iNet discovered at {host}
discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the GL-iNet router at {host}?

settings.title: Configure GL-iNet Router
settings.description: Set up what to track using GLiNet classes (the icons in your webUI/app, such as phone, computer, laptop, server, etc).

data_description.tracked_classes: Define which classes should be turned into device trackers.
data_description.monitor_classes: Define which classes should be turned into sensors.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to update the sensors (in seconds).
data_description.trusted_mode: Disable to remove potentially sensitive data such as IP/SSID/Passwords.

groups.title: Configure GL-iNet Router
groups.description:
Organize your MAC addresses.

**Format:** `"Friendly Name (optional)" MAC1 MAC2 ...`

data_description.mac_groups: Combine MAC addresses for the same device into a single device tracker.
data_description.guest_groups: Combine MAC addresses for the same guest device into a single device tracker.

abort.already_in_progress: Discovery for this router is already in progress.

init.title: Reconfigure GL-iNet Router
init.description: Adjust tracked classes and scan interval.

data_description.tracked_classes: Define which classes should be turned into device trackers.
data_description.monitor_classes: Define which classes should be turned into sensors.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to update the sensors (in seconds).
data_description.trusted_mode: Disable to remove potentially sensitive data such as IP/SSID/Passwords.

groups.title: Configure GL-iNet Router
groups.description:
Organize your MAC addresses. 

**Format:** `"Friendly Name (optional)" MAC1 MAC2 ...`

data_description.mac_groups: Combine MAC addresses for the same device into a single device tracker.
data_description.guest_groups: Combine MAC addresses for the same guest device into a single device tracker.
